MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR JURY TRIAL STRICKEN. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; P. DIAS, CLERK; RHONDA FUNG, REPORTER.
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624, ANNE E. BOULIANE.
MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 624

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DYSON, JOYCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH ST., #523, S.F., CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-25-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS SHOULD DEFENDANT NOT VACATE BY 9/25/02.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 IN DEPT. 624 - APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. ALL PARTIES REST. THE MATTER WAS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT WHEN THE PARTIES WERE ABLE TO REACH A SETTLEMENT. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT WERE PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 34 SIXTH ST., #523, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103. LEASE FORFEITED. AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR PREMISES WILL ISSUE AND PLAINTIFF WILL DEPOSIT EVICTION FEES WITH THE SHERIFF OF THE CCSF FOR PREPOSTING THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF THIS WRIT ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT JOYCE DYSON VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5:00 P.M. ON SEPT. 25, 2002. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY THAT DATE AND TIME, THE WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY RIGHT TO MAKE A MOTION TO SET ASIDE OR VACATE ANY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THIS STIPULATED JUDGMENT OR TO APPLY FOR A STAY OF EXECUTION OR FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES ON SAID TIME AND DATE. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY THE SET DATE AND TIME, SEE TERMS AS REFLECTED IN THE FINISHED MINUTES OF 8-26-02. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. ALL PARTIES AGREED TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE BOULIANE; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: D. LUBIN, #3234 (624

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold Walter Evje, and there being no appearance by defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial of defendants stricken. Trial date is confirmed.
